---
name: Bug
about: Something behaves wrong
title: "bug: "
labels: ["type/bug"]
---

## What happens

A clear description of the wrong behavior. Not "it broke".

## What should happen

The expected behavior.

## How to reproduce

Exact steps. A bug nobody can reproduce is a ghost story.

## Context

Branch, commit SHA, data version if relevant, logs if you have them.

## Definition of done

What "fixed" looks like, including the test that would have caught this.
